subject: First Aid & Safety
title: What Inflammation Really Is
description: A quick win: understand What Inflammation Really Is.

hook.text: That red, swollen area around a wound isn't damage—it's your immune system at work.

buildup.text: Inflammation is the body's defense response to injury, infection, or irritation.

discovery.text: Blood vessels dilate, letting white blood cells flood into damaged tissue to fight threats.

twist.text: The swelling that feels harmful is actually creating a barrier to prevent infection spread.

climax.text: The four classic signs—redness, heat, swelling, pain—were described by Romans 2,000 years ago.

punchline.text: Inflammation hurts because healing is hard work.

quiz.question: What are the four classic signs of inflammation?
options: Numbness, tingling, cold, and pale skin
